definitions: The technique of using makeup to define and enhance the shape of the face, typically by applying darker shades to areas that are to be receded or shadowed and lighter shades to areas that are to be highlighted.
The process of shaping or molding something to its contours.
examples: She spent an hour on her contouring.
Contouring can dramatically change a person's appearance.
The artist used contouring to give the sculpture more depth.
